review_title: GrowthBar is the best SEO Chrome extension I've used.
description: So far, I don't have any complaints with BrowthBar. It's simple and delivers on exactly what I need it to do.
author: Elizabeth M.
pros: GrowthBar is the most convenient and effective SEO Chome extensions I've used. I use it almost daily for keyword exploration and competitive research. It shows me all the keyword stats I need to identify high-ROI search terms as well as what keywords my competition ranks for. I started using GrowthBar's backlink data to analyze and improve my content strategy, and in a matter of months, I was able to improve my site's domain authority and saw a significant boost in organic traffic. GrowthBar isn't clunky and only provides the most relevant data needed to pull actionable insights. Simple and reasonably priced - GrowthBar remains a staple in my SEO toolkit.
cons: There aren't any aspects of the tool I dislike.

review_title: A seamless SEO companion for Copywriters
author: Evelynn J.
pros: GrowthBar helps me to research topics to write about for clients and portfolio items. The software is pretty self-explanatory and gives valuable information about websites and topics, such as backlinks and additional topics curate content for. I also find that GrowthBar is helpful in market research.
cons: The only thing I'd say is that it's pretty basic compared to its competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Not a great experience to be honest and have since cancelled my subscription and still owed money from being overcharged.
author: Jamie K.
pros: Good tool for writing SEO optimised blogs.
cons: They have no customer service and they overcharged me on one month and I wrote three emails and have had no reply. Pretty disappointing!

review_title: Among the most used Chrome extensions in my toolkit.
description: Competitive analysis in SERPs is a weekly task and this tool helps to do that more efficiently.
author: Sam R.
pros: Super clean UX with regards to info provided on the front-end as well as more detailed information and tools in the dashboard make this a great supplement to any SEO stack.
cons: Not much to complain about here. It does exactly what it says it will do. I would like to see Google Search Console integration in the future.

review_title: Every modern marketer should use GrowthBar!
description: GrowthBar has helped advance my own SEO literacy and skills. It's affordable, easy to use, and I would recommend it to anyone. Thanks GrowthBar!
author: Madeline H.
pros: GrowthBar has an incredibly intuitive interface, provides the information every marketer needs to make SEO-related decisions, and overall made my job a lot easier!
cons: I can't name something I dislike about this product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In short, GrowthBar turns a simple Google search into a powerful and comprehensive SEO tool.
author: Jon T.
pros: GrowthBar Is a game-changer when it comes to Keyword Research. This simple SEO plugin integrates with Google and gives you keyword ideas based on your search, so it eliminates the need to go back and forth on a separate software. Additionally, you get website data under each Google results, which allows you to see how competitive the keyword is at a glance.
cons: The only thing I dont like about GrowthBar is that I don't own it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Making your SEO research and planning that much easier.
author: Jonathan S.
pros: It allows our team to better understand what our competitors are doing and do important keyword research.
cons: It does what it is intended to do and that is whats important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: GrowthBar is a great tool and easy to install. I think it has not even reached its full SEO potential yet offers so much for those in the SEO industry or businesses keeping an eye on their own SEO.
author: Tammy D.
pros: This is a great tool and offers many components of SEO including: 1. Business Self Discovery of Ranking 2. Keyword Searches with likely rankings for SEO Writing 3. Competitive Research 4. Client Care Checkups - SEO 5. General advantage for those offering SEO
cons: I would not say it had cons, only that due to my services offerings I did not use it enough. So when I had to review expenses and where to cut, unfortunately, this was one.
